title: NATLClaw MCP + Persona Configuration
description: Defines MCP server connections and external personas for the NATLClaw agent.

mcpServers.description: Shared pool of MCP server definitions, referenced by name from personas.

personasPaths.description: Additional directories to scan for external persona.json manifests. Each entry can be an absolute path or a path relative to this mcp.json. Inline personas take precedence over external ones of the same name.

personas.description: Persona definitions keyed by name. Each persona is an external personality the agent can adopt.

mcpServer.description: An MCP server connection — either a local stdio process or a remote HTTP endpoint.

type.description: Transport type: 'stdio' for a local process, 'http' for a remote endpoint.

args.description: Command-line arguments for the stdio process.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the stdio process.

url.description: Remote MCP server URL (required for http).

headers.description: HTTP headers sent with requests (e.g. authorization).

timeout.description: Connection timeout in seconds (converted to milliseconds internally). Default 30.

persona.description: An externally-defined persona the agent can adopt at runtime.

description.description: Short human-readable label for the persona.

instructions.description: Relative path to a markdown file containing the system prompt.

heartbeatTask.description: Prompt injected during the capture step of each heartbeat cycle. Required for second_brain and freeform workflows; optional for steps workflow.

workflow.description: Heartbeat workflow mode. second_brain (default): 4-step structured knowledge capture with JSON notes. freeform: 4-step free-form execution with tool use, plain-text brain note. steps: fully custom steps defined in the steps array.

steps.description: Custom workflow steps (required when workflow=steps). Each step runs in sequence; {prev} in prompt is replaced with the previous step's output.

prompt.description: Prompt text. Use {prev} to inject previous step output, {brain} for brain summary.

storeToBrain.description: If true, the agent distils a brain note from this step's output.

stepwise.description: When true (and workflow=steps), run exactly ONE step per heartbeat cycle. Progress is tracked in agent state and persists across heartbeats. When false (default), all steps run in a single heartbeat.

mcpServers.description: Names of MCP servers from the top-level mcpServers pool to attach to this persona.

file.description: Path to a .py file relative to this mcp.json's directory (alternative to module).

module.description: Dotted Python module path to import (e.g. 'personas.devops_engineer.tools').

functions.description: Specific function names to load. If omitted, all public functions are imported.
